calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Connie Y. Chan, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Tammy Ho, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Ngan Chu Wong, a/k/a Debbie Wong.
Default was entered against defendant on May 27, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Tammy Ho, and against the Defaulted Defendant Ngan Chu Wong, a/k/a Debbie Wong as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,567.00.
Attorney's Fees - $3,000.00.
Costs - $1,000.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $42,567.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Continued To Aug-09-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 8/9/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
